final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 9-grid 小红书 cover image for an amateur influencer media account (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "素人风格" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 2010s Tumblr soft girl visual culture, Sanrio kawaii palette heritage, 小红书 amateur lifestyle photography; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 9-grid layout (nine equal squares), central title placement
Subject: must include 大疆 Pocket 4 product as focal element
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "大强pocket4初体验" (central title, cute and differentiated typography)
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must be 9-grid format
Avoid:
